description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Beta that triggers on push events with tags V*RC* and V*DB*. The workflow has multiple jobs for different operating systems: macOS, Linux, and Windows. Each job checks out the repository, sets up AWS CLI, tags the commit, checks out submodules, fetches dependencies, builds an artifact, and deploys it to AWS. The Linux job also has a Docker deployment step, and the Windows job uses PowerShell scripts for building and deployment.
